description: Per-component CLI contract conformance results (Plan 018 WI-2). Separate from the frozen v1 feature matrix by design (Sol review): this tracks the horizontal contract effort. A component is recorded here only when the kit runs green in its CI.

agent-suite.notes: Wheel lane (P1) not yet wired. dry-run exit-2 convention resolved: codex-plugins dry-run now exits 0 (plan display is success, not a usage error).

regista.evidence: tests/test_cli_conformance.py in regista CI (check job, py3.13/3.14); regista PR #9
regista.notes: Adoption surfaced and fixed two contract §5 traceback defects (workflow validate on a missing file; RegistaError escaping Regista() construction). Kit consumed as pinned agent-suite-conformance==1.0.0 (Plan 019 B1); CI matrix moved to 3.13/3.14 (kit requires >=3.12). Hermetic cases declared non-DB so the conftest DSN-substring skip heuristic doesn't silently skip the gate in CI.

agent-notes.evidence: tests/test_cli_conformance.py in agent-notes CI (check job, py3.13/3.14); agent-notes PR #10
agent-notes.notes: Clean adoption — no CLI fixes required; the earlier P0 envelope conversion already held. Keeps decision-52 exit codes (2/3/4); kit checks version-independent contract invariants.

agent-provenance.notes: B3 retrofit landed the cli_entry envelope boundary. The test imports agent_suite.conformance — the PEP-420 namespace shipped by the published agent-suite-conformance==1.0.0 wheel — and passes (3 cases). Note: the conformance console script must be freshly generated to point at cli_entry (pip install -e does this in CI); a stale local venv script pointing at the click group gives a false negative.

agent-capability-broker.evidence: tests/test_cli_conformance.py (SuccessCase shims-json, ErrorCase doctor-missing-manifest, UsageCase, BrokenPipeCase)
agent-capability-broker.notes: Test imports agent_suite.conformance (the published PEP-420 namespace package); the read-only doctor envelope path + framework guarantees are enforced (4 cases pass). Act-path exit-code reclassification still deferred (load-bearing install-harness --dry-run=2).

dossier.notes: Test imports agent_suite.conformance (the published PEP-420 namespace package); gate runs and passes (3 cases) on py3.13.

agent-wake.notes: New adoption (the last component, completing Plan 018 P2 / Plan 019 B3). Added a top-level cli envelope/no-traceback boundary (emit_error + ConfigError->CONFIG_ERROR, Exception->INTERNAL_ERROR, BrokenPipeError swallowed) and a --json flag on 'secrets list'; _load_raw_config now raises ConfigError instead of sys.exit(1). Test imports agent_suite.conformance (the PEP-420 namespace shipped by the published agent-suite-conformance==1.0.0 wheel). The kit requires py>=3.12 so the dev dep is conditional (python_version>='3.12'); the daemon still supports 3.11 at runtime and the gate runs on the 3.12 CI lane. install-harness --dry-run=2 left untouched (load-bearing). agent-wake has no regista dependency, so it is correctly no-spine in the cross-repo lock-agreement check.
